title: Light Overlay
description: A Light Level Overlay Mod that's efficient and powerful.
body:
# A Light Overlay Mod that's efficient and powerful. ![Works with Shaders (Iris)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdf90ffb230c674200a9fba3bc1a811b615b015b.png) [![generic-plural](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/translate/generic-plural_vector.svg)](https://github.com/lugosieben/lightoverlay/blob/latest/TRANSLATE.md) This mod adds a configurable, fully client-side Light Overlay to the game, showing you where mobs can spawn at night. Very useful for spawn-proofing. ![Light Overlay Modes Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/8qVa1XCN/images/31ad4bd850cb59d1d9aa1e95e5fb93b46fc99ba8.png) ## Feature Requests & Bug Reports Feature Requests / Bug Reports are always welcome and they typically get implemented in less than 2 days! To create one, you can simply [open an issue](https://github.com/lugosieben/lightoverlay/issues/) and I'll look at it. ## Translate Light Overlay to your language! How to help: [Guide](https://github.com/lugosieben/lightoverlay/blob/latest/TRANSLATE.md) | Language | Translators ♥️ | |----------|--------------| |German _(incomplete)_|[Kolpixx](https://github.com/Kolpixx)| |Chinese (Simplified) _(incomplete)_|[edeipici](https://github.com/edeipici)| |Spanish _(incomplete)_|[UnPanMuySaS](https://github.com/UnPanMuySaS)| |Hungarian|[BigM](https://github.com/blockmarkking-sys)| ## Configuration Use Mod Menu or `/lightoverlay config` to enter the config. ## Usage Use the keybind (F9 by default) or `/lightoverlay` to toggle the Light Overlay.
Made by Lugo, with help for Iris compat by lowercasebtw If you like Light Overlay, consider giving a **star** on [GitHub](https://github.com/lugosieben/lightoverlay)! ⭐
